edges.purpose: delegate swarm and workspace creation, agent wiring, and topology modification tasks
delegate event firing and run status monitoring
delegate read-only queries about existing workspaces, swarms, and topologies
report created IDs and results back to the orchestrator
report run status and outcomes back to the orchestrator
report current platform state back to the orchestrator

skills.purpose: create new workspaces on the platform
create new swarms within a workspace
add or remove agents, edges, skills, and human nodes from any swarm topology
write agent constitutions after creating agents
fire an event payload into a swarm to start a run
check recent run status for a swarm
read all workspaces and swarms from the platform
read the full topology hierarchy.json for a given swarm
create knowledge documents at any scope for agents to reference in their constitutions
write and register Python skills at any scope
get agent UUIDs after swarm creation so constitutions can be written via update-constitution
build the full topology of a new swarm in one compound call — agents, edges, knowledge, skills, connections
write all agent constitutions in a single batched call
